title: Inspector Daya
desc: A corrupt police officer, entangled with a smuggler, undergoes a transformative journey towards justice when he falls in love with a woman.

title: Disco
desc: Disco, orphan cherishing friendship, loves Shiny, don's daughter. Don kidnaps friends, demanding choice between love and loyalty.

title: Kadaram Kondan
desc: Vasu, a doctor, rescues KK, a criminal, from getting murdered in the hospital. However, when Vasu's wife gets kidnapped, he is asked to get KK out in exchange for his wife's safe return.

title: Idharkuthaaney Aasaipattai Balakumara
desc: An aimless young man and a stressed banker become entangled, leading to trouble as the banker struggles to meet his demanding boss's expectations.

title: Aadu Puli Attam
desc: Madan joins the police to capture former friends involved in criminal activities.

title: Hit And Run Squad
desc: An elite police squad chases dangerous criminals through intense investigations and high-speed pursuits. As secrets unfold, courage and teamwork drive their relentless fight for justice.

title: Kootathil Oruthan
desc: Aravind, a regular average student, falls in love with Janani, the class topper. When she rejects his proposal, Aravind sets out to change his life and win Janani's love.

title: Super Hit Songs
desc: Compilation of catchy Tamil songs by notable artists from various movies.

title: Irandaam Ulagam
desc: Depressed Madhu finds hope on an exoplanet with the help of his look-alike.
